name: Whiskers
description: Graceful and sassy. Expert at posing mid-yawn.

name: Mittens
description: Loves the camera. Hates loud noises.

name: Boots
description: Chonk. Very good at sitting still.

name: Cleo
description: Cleo’s plush coat and round face give her a charming and photogenic appeal perfect for studio shoots.

name: Luna
description: A fluffy Siberian with piercing green eyes and a calm demeanor, perfect for cozy shoots.
